recent_excerpts: Unit 42 traces the Axios supply chain compromise from initial dropper through forensic cleanup — affecting multiple downstream consumers. Full attack chain mapped.
Elastic Security Labs researcher Joe Desimone built a proof-of-concept tool in an afternoon that detected a supply chain compromise of the Axios HTTP library, affecting npm…
A critical SSRF vulnerability in the Axios HTTP client library allows attackers to exfiltrate cloud instance metadata, potentially leading to remote code execution and full cloud account compromise.
